option_line: arroyo_askAboutZGR3c:"So her plan was to get those mercs killed?"
original: So her plan was to get those mercs killed?

option_line: arroyo_askAboutZGR3d:"Surely you can use this against her."
original: Surely you can use this against her.

option_line: arroyo_askAboutZGR3b:"So her plan is to get me killed?"
original: So her plan is to get me killed?

He gives you a look.

"Don't even start."

"Probably not." He gives you a look.

"But she'll use your death if she finds a way to make it useful. And she will."

"Probably not." He gives you a look.

"But she'll use their death if she finds a way to make it useful to her. And she will."

He gives you a look.

"We'll see."

"My advice is, if you get involved? Watch your back. Mind yourself. Don't trust her."

He looks away, thinking. His hands held together in front of his mouth, not quite the form of Luddic prayer.

"Seen a few fleet operators fall right off the map. She's looking for something. Big risk. I'd bet if I knew what it was I'd say it wasn't worth it."

option_line: arroyo_askAboutZGR5c:"She wants me to find something called the 'Threat'."
original: She wants me to find something called the 'Threat'.
